nasb.text: His radiance is like the sunlight; He has rays flashing from His hand, And there is the hiding of His power.

esv.text: His brightness was like the light; rays flashed from his hand; and there he veiled his power.

cnv.text: 他的輝煌如光，手中四射光芒，就在其中隱藏著能力。

ccb.text: 祂的荣光犹如太阳的光辉， 祂的手射出光芒， 其中蕴藏着大能。
